notes: BG 6.33's engineering layer preserves the verse's load-bearing terms verbatim: cancalatva (restlessness), sthitim sthiram (firm continuance), samyena (as equality), Madhusudana (the demon-slayer epithet). The Gaudiya commentator's gloss ('three or four days') is quoted verbatim with attribution. The Advaita commentator's reading ('I do not see, I cannot conceive, its steady undisturbed continuance, owing to the unsteadiness of the mind') is preserved. No tradition-conflation. PASS.
